label: Pseudonymous student identifier
cleaning_or_derivation_rule: Trim whitespace, uppercase, and use as primary key after version resolution

label: Submitted record version
cleaning_or_derivation_rule: Keep the highest version within student_id

label: Self-described gender category
allowed_values: Female; Male; Nonbinary; Prefer not to say

label: Mean academic self-efficacy score
missing_or_invalid: Missing if fewer than four valid items
cleaning_or_derivation_rule: Mean of five directionally aligned items

label: Permission for research use
cleaning_or_derivation_rule: Retain Yes only in the analysis data
